name: test_tallying
description:
Test: Check the tallying feature counts as expected
Steps:
1. Record consent for injection, withdraw it, invalidate it,
   provide nasal spray consent and vaccinate.
2. Verify the tally updates correctly after each action.
Verification:
- Tally counts match expected values after each step.
descriptionHtml:
Test: Check the tallying feature counts as expected
Steps:

  1. Record consent for injection, withdraw it, invalidate it,
    provide nasal spray consent and vaccinate.
  2. Verify the tally updates correctly after each action.
    Verification:
  • Tally counts match expected values after each step.

steps.name: Log in as User(username='ann24@example.net', password='ann24@example.net', role='nurse') and choose team Team(name='Lyons-Bailey est. 2003', workgroup='U024K', careplus_venue_code='U024K', email='hughesmohammad@example.net', phone='+44(0)7700 900310')
Log in as {1} and choose team {2}
Log in as User(username='ann24@example.net', password='ann24@example.net', role='nurse')

parameters.value: (User(username='ann24@example.net', password='ann24@example.net', role='nurse'), Team(name='Lyons-Bailey est. 2003', workgroup='U024K', careplus_venue_code='U024K', email='hughesmohammad@example.net', phone='+44(0)7700 900310'))

steps.name: Add batch for 'Cell-based Trivalent Influenza Vaccine Seqirus'
Fill in expiry date with datetime.date(2025, 12, 7)
Fill in expiry date with datetime.date(2025, 12, 7)
Click on 'flu' session at School(name="Sawtry Infants' School", urn='110714', site=None)
Click on 'flu' session at School(name="Sawtry Infants' School", urn='110714', site=None)

testStage.description:
Test: Check the tallying feature counts as expected
Steps:
1. Record consent for injection, withdraw it, invalidate it,
   provide nasal spray consent and vaccinate.
2. Verify the tally updates correctly after each action.
Verification:
- Tally counts match expected values after each step.

steps.name: Click on Record a new consent response
Click on Record a new consent response
Click on Yes, for the injected vaccine only
Click on Yes, for the injected vaccine only
Select 'No' for health question 'Does your child have a bleeding disorder or are they taking anticoagulant therapy?'

parameters.name: args
parameters.value: (<HealthQuestion.BLEEDING_DISORDER_FLU: 'Does your child have a bleeding disorder or are they taking anticoagulant therapy?'>, 'No')

steps.name: Select 'No' for health question 'Has your child had a severe allergic reaction (anaphylaxis) to a previous dose of the injected flu vaccine, or any ingredient of the vaccine?'

parameters.name: args
parameters.value: (<HealthQuestion.SEVERE_ALLERGIC_REACTION_INJECTED: 'Has your child had a severe allergic reaction (anaphylaxis) to a previous dose of the injected flu vaccine, or any ingredient of the vaccine?'>, 'No')

steps.name: Select 'No' for health question 'Does your child have any other medical conditions the immunisation team should be aware of?'

parameters.name: args
parameters.value: (<HealthQuestion.MEDICAL_CONDITIONS_FLU: 'Does your child have any other medical conditions the immunisation team should be aware of?'>, 'No')

steps.name: Select 'No' for health question 'Has your child had a flu vaccination in the last 3 months?'

parameters.name: args
parameters.value: (<HealthQuestion.FLU_PREVIOUSLY: 'Has your child had a flu vaccination in the last 3 months?'>, 'No')

Click on 'Dr Tina Matthews (Mum)' radio button
